title: Weight table with pagination
description: Build the paginated weight entries table with Date, Weight, and Actions columns.
acceptanceCriteria: Table renders with columns: Date | Weight | Actions
Weight is displayed as a decimal with the user's unit label (e.g. '185.5 lbs')
Pagination controls show current page, total pages, and Prev/Next buttons
Prev is disabled on page 1, Next is disabled on last page
Table shows empty state when user has no entries

steps.details: Create src/web/src/components/WeightTable.tsx. Props: refreshKey (number), onEntryUpdated(): void, onEntryDeleted(): void. State: entries (WeightEntry[]), page (number, default 1), totalPages (number), isLoading (boolean). Fetch data with getWeightEntries({ page, page_size: 10, time_filter: 'all' }) on mount and when page/refreshKey changes.

Use shadcn/ui Table, TableHeader, TableRow, TableHead, TableBody, TableCell components. Columns: Date (format recorded_at as DD.MM.YYYY using date-fns format(parseISO(entry.recorded_at), 'dd.MM.yyyy')), Weight (display entry.weight_value with user.weight_unit), Actions (placeholder ... button). Show a TableRow with colspan 3 and 'No entries yet' message when entries array is empty.

Below the table, render a div with flex justify-between items-center. Left: 'Page X of Y'. Right: two shadcn Button components — 'Previous' (disabled when page === 1, onClick: setPage(page - 1)) and 'Next' (disabled when page === totalPages, onClick: setPage(page + 1)).

Take screenshot of table with entries. Add more than 10 entries and verify pagination controls appear. Click Next and verify page 2 loads. Verify date formatting is DD.MM.YYYY. Verify empty state when no entries.

technicalNotes: Use parseISO from date-fns to parse the ISO date string from the API before formatting
Get weightUnit from useAuth() context: const { user } = useAuth()
